productDisplayName: Nike Men Pintuck Grey Track Pants
description: Composition Grey track pants for men made of 100% polyester, has a wide elasticated waistband with a drawstring, blue tape detailing on the sides, two insert pockets on the sides, one pocket at the back with a velcro closure and an appliqued nike swoosh logo on the left leg Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately with like colours Do not bleach Cool iron Get more out of your workouts with this flattering pair of tracks from Nike. Team this with tees and sports footwear for trips to the gym.
